age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years (relaxable for OBC, SC/ST, PwBD)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 03 years SC/ST: 05 years PWBD (General): 10 years PWBD (OBC): 13 years PWBD (SC/ST): 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Medical Degree viz. MD/MS/DNB in respective disciplines recognized by NMC/Institute of National Importance. Valid Registration with NMC/State Medical Council.
qualification.details: Postgraduate Medical Degree viz. MD/MS/DNB in respective disciplines recognized by NMC/Institute of National Importance. Valid Registration with NMC/State Medical Council. For Trauma & Emergency Medicine: Post Graduate medical degree like, MD/MS/DNB in Medicine/ Emergency Medicine / Surgery / Orthopaedics / Paediatrics / Anesthesiology from recognized University/Institute. For Medical Oncology/Haematology: Post Graduate medical degree like, MD/DNB in Medicine/Paediatrics/Radiotherapy / Pathology from recognized University/Institute in addition to candidates with DM/DNB Medical Oncology/Hematology can also apply.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA
salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA as admissible under rule(s).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts at AIIMS Bhopal is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Medical Degree viz. MD/MS/DNB in the respective disciplines recognized by NMC/Institute of National Importance, along with valid registration with NMC/State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 45 years. Age relaxations are applicable for OBC, SC/ST, and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Senior Residents at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 57 vacancies for Senior Residents (Non-Academic) posts at AIIMS Bhopal for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1500/- for General/OBC/EWS categories. SC/ST and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will be based on a Written Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a temporary or permanent job?
faq.answer: The Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions at AIIMS Bhopal are advertised as temporary jobs.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all over India are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria. The notification mentions the location as Madhya Pradesh, but does not restrict applications based on state of origin.
